calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval Of The Sixteenth Account And Report Of Trustee Of The Trust Under The Will Of James Abajian For The Benefit Of Leon Johnson, For Settlement Thereof, And For Allowance Of Trustee And Attorney Fees
Off Calendar May-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caitlin Carey for Cynthia Scritchfield (Petitioner).

Ms. Caitlin stated that the Trustee is requesting a 1% fee which comes out to about $40.00 per hour, that they have no objection to bi-annual accountings but that they are here voluntarily and do not want the order to require them to come in, and that UC Berkeley (the Remainder Beneficiary) is closely monitoring the investments. The Petition for Approval of the Sixteenth Account was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Y. Watts. (Not Reported)

Petition For Approval Of The Sixteenth Account And Report Of Trustee Of The Trust Under The Will Of James Abajian For The Benefit Of Leon Johnson, For Settlement Thereof, And For Allowance Of Trustee And Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Apr-09-2014 Continued To May-07-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caitlin Carey for Cynthia Scritchfield.

The Petition for Approval of the Sixteenth Account, etc. was continued to May 7, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a supplement to support fees.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
